mainSource.name: Perguruan Ulong
mainSource.description: Main quest IT Novice sengaja tidak ditulis di file ini karena jalur utamanya memakai Perguruan Ulong.

daily.title: Read one technical error message carefully
daily.description: Pick one error message from your computer, browser console, terminal, or an online example. Identify the system, the exact failure, and one likely next action.

daily.title: Practice one SQL SELECT query
daily.description: Complete one beginner SQL SELECT exercise and write what the query asked for, what table it used, and what result it returned.

daily.title: Finish one Git branching exercise
daily.description: Complete one Learn Git Branching level and summarize the command you used and why it changed the repository state.

daily.title: Trace one troubleshooting checklist
daily.description: Pick one small issue such as no internet, app not opening, or login failure. Write a step-by-step checklist before trying random fixes.
